TextView.android:text: Export and restore PermsTest settings from /sdcard/dev.perms.test/backups/.

com.google.android.material.checkbox.Mat.android:text: Full/private backup (ADB/LADB/Internal Shizuku keys and app-private files)

TextView.android:text: Cache, temp, and workspace files are excluded.

com.google.android.material.checkbox.Mat.android:text: Custom split options (ABI/Language/DPI) on archive install
Hide App From File Opener Dialog
Show split-only APK warning instead of handing off
Skip staging for files larger than 900 MB
Use Android/data path for APK install staging
Use staging folder for package installs
Keep bottom log above navigation bar

TextView.android:text: Optional launcher surface. Disabled by default; when enabled, HOME shows only allowed kiosk apps and shortcuts.
Allowed items: tap to enable or disable. Drag ☰ to rearrange kiosk launcher order.

com.google.android.material.checkbox.Mat.android:text: Refresh kiosk allowed list on timer
Enable Hardware Button Bypass (Volume Up + Volume Down)

TextView.android:text: Exit pattern: top-left x3 → top-right x1 → bottom-left x4 → bottom-right x2
